description: Add a setup hint to `opentabs status` output when the server is running but no MCP clients are connected. First-time users who miss the one-time setup instructions from `opentabs start` have no way to discover how to configure their MCP client. This adds a dim hint line pointing them to `opentabs config show --show-secret`.

userStories.title: Show MCP setup hint in status when 0 clients connected
userStories.description: As a first-time user who missed the initial setup instructions, I want `opentabs status` to hint at how to configure my MCP client so I can complete the setup.
acceptanceCriteria: When `opentabs status` shows the server is running and MCP clients is 0, a dim hint line is printed after the main status block: 'No MCP clients connected. Run opentabs config show --show-secret for setup instructions.'
The hint is NOT shown when MCP clients > 0
The hint is NOT shown in --json mode (only in human-readable output)
The hint uses dim styling (pc.dim) consistent with other hint text in the CLI
